description: The reconciliation record for one invoice against its PO and (if a GRN exists) its GRN. It records the match type selected by GRN existence (THREE_WAY iff a GRN exists for the line, else TWO_WAY plus milestone acceptance for service POs), the tolerance config applied tax-inclusive on price, quantity and absolute amount, and the resulting matchStatus (matched auto-clears and relieves GR/IR; exception raises a typed MatchException routed to a resolver). The single record that decides whether a payable auto-clears or routes to resolution (axiom A8).

fields.name: identifier
fields.label: Match Ref.
fields.validation: system pattern; unique; immutable once created
fields.purpose: Stable key for the reconciliation so its exceptions, GR/IR clearing and the released payable all trace to one match run; the handle an auditor reads for the three-way/two-way reconciliation (ISO 8.6).

fields.name: poId
fields.label: Purchase Order
fields.validation: resolves to the PO the invoice bills; not null
fields.purpose: The order leg of the reconciliation; price is compared against the PO agreed price and the two-way amount against PO value incl. tax. Always present (every match reconciles against the PO).

fields.name: grnId
fields.label: Goods Receipt
fields.mandatoryCondition: set iff a GRN exists for the PO line/category (materials, three-way); null on the two-way path (services / freight / no-GRN)
fields.validation: resolves to a GRN of the same PO when set; null forces TWO_WAY
fields.purpose: The receipt leg of the reconciliation; its presence is the single fact that selects THREE_WAY and makes quantity compare against GRN accepted quantity (not ordered quantity); null selects TWO_WAY (axiom A8).

fields.name: invoiceId
fields.label: Invoice
fields.validation: resolves to the captured, non-duplicate invoice being matched; not null
fields.purpose: The invoice leg being reconciled; the match runs after the duplicate check clears, and a matched result clears this invoice's GR/IR (three-way) or posts its payable directly (two-way).

fields.name: matchType
fields.label: Match Type
fields.validation: THREE_WAY iff grnId is set (a GRN exists for the line/category); else TWO_WAY
fields.purpose: Records which reconciliation was run, decided solely by GRN existence not category name; THREE_WAY checks quantity against GRN accepted quantity, TWO_WAY against the PO plus milestone acceptance for service POs (axiom A8).

fields.name: matchStatus
fields.label: Match Status
fields.validation: matched when within all tolerance bands (auto-clear); exception when outside any band (raises a typed MatchException)
fields.purpose: The outcome of the match: matched auto-clears, relieves GR/IR (three-way) and posts the payable; exception raises a typed MatchException routed to the accountable resolver. Feeds the first-time-match-rate and exception-rate KPIs.

fields.name: tolerancePricePercent
fields.label: Price Tolerance %
fields.validation: 0..100; configurable per tenant; price within = abs(invoiceUnitPrice - poAgreedPrice)/poAgreedPrice <= this
fields.purpose: The configurable price-variance band the match applies; within it the price leg passes, outside it raises a price-variance exception routed to the Buyer.

fields.name: toleranceQtyPercent
fields.label: Quantity Tolerance %
fields.validation: 0..100; configurable per tenant; qty within = abs(invoiceQty - matchedQty)/matchedQty <= this, where matchedQty is GRN accepted qty (three-way) or PO/milestone qty (two-way)
fields.purpose: The configurable quantity-variance band the match applies against GRN accepted quantity (three-way) or PO quantity (two-way); outside it raises a qty-over / qty-under exception routed to Receiving.

fields.name: toleranceAbsolute
fields.label: Absolute Tolerance
fields.validation: >= 0; configurable per tenant; amount within = abs(invoiceTotalInclTax - expectedTotalInclTax) <= this (tax-inclusive)
fields.purpose: The configurable absolute amount band on the tax-inclusive total; the amount leg must pass alongside price and quantity for auto-clear, otherwise the variance routes to the relevant resolver.

fields.name: taxInclusive
fields.label: Tax-Inclusive
fields.validation: true; all comparisons are amount-inclusive-of-tax and tax must reconcile, with reverse-charge flagged for imports
fields.purpose: Asserts the match is evaluated tax-inclusive so tax errors fail the amount check and route to Tax/Compliance; a price within band with a tax error still does not auto-clear (axiom A8).

fields.name: expectedTotalInclTax
fields.label: Expected Total (Incl. Tax)
fields.validation: three-way = grnAcceptedQty * agreedPrice + tax; two-way = PO value incl. tax
fields.purpose: The expected payable the invoice total is compared against within the absolute band; computed from GRN accepted quantity at PO price (three-way) or PO value (two-way), the reference figure for the amount leg.

fields.name: matchedAt
fields.label: Matched At
fields.validation: now() when matchStatus becomes matched (incl. after resolution)
fields.purpose: Timestamps when the match cleared (first-time or after resolution); orders the GR/IR relief and commitment actualisation and anchors the audit/SSE entry (axiom A13).

invariants: A8 THREE_WAY iff a GRN exists for the line, else TWO_WAY (+ milestone acceptance for services); match reconciles amounts including tax; within tolerance auto-clears and relieves GR/IR, outside raises a typed exception
A12 base-currency normalization for the tolerance and thresholds
A13 audit + SSE on every match run
three-way quantity is compared to GRN accepted quantity, not ordered quantity
a cleared match relieves GR/IR and moves the commitment from committed to actual
